description: Diagnostic run against an already-running PilotSwarm worker. Prefer managed live runs for CI and production-grade E2E evidence.

defaultCheck.rubric: Evaluate whether the observed PilotSwarm execution satisfies the scenario description, deterministic checks, tool calls, CMS/session evidence, and terminal state. Mark PASSED only when the user-visible response and durable runtime evidence satisfy the scenario without contradictions; PARTIAL for incomplete or ambiguous evidence; FAILED for violations.
